description: Generally, the platform understands the needs of businesses and individuals in the digital age. Their expertise in AI and machine learning ensures that I have access to cutting-edge technology that can transform the way I work and learn. But the major issue is they need to upgrade their payment methods and also improve their App. They often suspend accounts due to minor issues that can be resolved by their team of experts. Overall, I would rate it as a 7 out of 10 because of my experience with it.
author: Dvock A.
pros: I like the fact that, when I use the software I get exceptional results. The software has led to increased efficiency, improved accuracy, and significant time savings when utilizing the platform. The main selling point of the clickworker software is its ability to automate repetitive tasks and streamline complex processes. Another benefit of the clickworker product is its advanced data processing capabilities and its crowd-based workforce.
cons: Occasionally, the platform may experience a slight learning curve for users who are completely new to AI and machine learning technologies. Furthermore, using its App is a major drawback since the App is constantly poor in terms of performance and efficiency. It takes time for one to click on some button and the process is slow.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked the flexibility Clickworker offers, allowing me to work from anywhere and choose tasks that match my skills and interests.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I didn't have a very good experience with this App, nor with the people I recommended it to. The application offers you everyday tasks that apparently seem to be easy, tasks that require you to provide your personal data, address, self, pics, videos, photo of documents and in the end they never approve your task, they point out the error and ask you to correct, you do everything right and they just don't pay, I found it a bit invasive and unreliable
author: Andressa M.
pros: Apparently it is an attractive, didactic App, with vibrant cores, easy to use it
cons: What I liked least is that the app, despite being quite interesting, didn't actually work for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is excellent for those looking for both fixed and extra income. They pay in Euros and it helps a lot for those who need it through the quick tasks they have there, it's very good.
author: Alan J.
pros: Excellent website/app. I've been using it for years and I don't have to complain about much.
cons: Just the authentication, which is a little annoying because of the application, which is annoying to do the facial, but anyway, it's easy to access it afterwards.

description: It offers payment through PayPal It has varying options depending on the location. Clickworker has a support team that responds to the users inquiries.
author: Divya C.
pros: It is flexible. The platform allows for remote work. It enables the users to complete tasks on their own schedule
cons: I find the hourly pay rate to be very low. and especially for tasks like surveys. some tasks are repetitive.

description: I mostly use clickworker to gain access to the UHRS tasks which are always available and simple to perform.
author: Becky O.
pros: I like that the sign up process on clickworker is quite simple without rigorous tests and requirements. This makes it accessible to almost everyone who has an interest in performing the tasks provided.The guidelines provided before the tasks make it easy to complete.
cons: The payment system can be discouraging since they take almost 28 working days to process payouts from the day of request.

description: Clickworker is very useful to earn some pocket money for the students. It provides some easier tasks like data annotation, image classification, image collection etc on its platform. The payments were also processed in every week. It only used as side earning source.
author: Pratap M.
pros: Clickworker provides small tasks to users of the platform to complete. By completing tasks users can earn some money. The payments were processed in weekly basis via Payoneer. It also supports UHRS platform for tasks allocation. Clickworker also has mobile application inorder to complete tasks on the go.
cons: Majority of the time clickworker doesn't update the new tasks in its platform. It only shows the old tasks available on platform. Another demerit is that, users have to wait upto 30 days redeem period inorder to withdraw the earned money .

description: Clickworker is a superb company to hold in thoughts every time you want a few extra earnings. You will always have something to do so you can make sure you never go broke, once you sign up here. No fixed schedule is required so it's convenient for housewives and students and even freelancers. If you are well versed in English then it's much easier for you to take up surveys.
author: Zaiba S.
pros: Work is always available on this website. It can be easily accessible from our desktop and mobile devices. The work is not monotonous so it keeps the users engaged, makes them feel like their contributions are not going in vain, and useful work is being done. They have a good customer support team and they get back to you every time with the right assistance. Pay is decent and once you have a verified Paypal account it's easier to set up automatic payments.
cons: 1) If you don't keep up with the guidelines you are disqualified from continuing on the tasks. 2)Sometimes work is rejected and no explanation is given as to what can be done to improve or avoid in the future. 3) As soon as the task is completed, money is credited into your click worker account. But the same money will be taken from your account if your work does not meet its quality after the review, which is honestly unfair.

description: I'm liking the app as it's intuitive and simple to use. They could improve the section for filling in the contact information, which is a bit confusing to fill in.
author: Lucas M.
pros: Intuitive interface, well-placed buttons, and fast session processing, even on weaker devices.
cons: There are sections in the application where it is not possible to translate certain texts into the desired language.There is also a bug on the home screen regarding tasks that are no longer available, but appear as if they are open for enrollment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Clickworker Best for software selection for Eranings
description: By increasing taskes and some extra money to get the better software trusted and impressive for the taskes best income site for those who want earn some money and good customer support
author: Matta S.
pros: Any time you can the website it will shows the taskes and it can access from the pc are mobile phone and it easy to draw the money from the PayPal is very easy to withdraw and good customer support and right assistance best for Eranings to students
cons: It takes late to update the clickworker taskes and major issue is to withdraw money is very late it need to wait 20 days more than 20 days and less money making taskes some times it does not any tasks showing in it tough to get complete the takes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Mi experiencia usando ClickWorker ha sido satisfactoria, he obtenido algunas ganancias, me permite estar activa
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que más me gusta es el acceso a micro trabajos, las opciones que presenta y la forma fácil de poder acceder a ganancias adicionales. El lenguaje de clickworker es amable y familiar. Acceder es fácil, el registro es rápido, su versión movil es un plus, al igual que la variedad de tareas a las que podemos acceder .
cons: La única desventaja que veo en ClickWorker es que la plataforma no nos presenta avisos ando hay tareas disponibles, por tal razón debemos estar revisándola..

review_title: a good application but sometimes a little difficult to access
description: I had a little difficulty at first, but after practice I saw that I can get a lot of use out of the app, but I'm satisfied with it.
author: Paulo C.
pros: its easy installation and the practicality of assessing some items.
cons: I wish there were more usage options, for example shortcuts for some functions

review_title: There are a lot of flaws.
description: I would say, it’s definitely not a bad experience. There just needs to be a few tweaks and bigger payouts. Time is money!
author: Jordan P.
pros: I like the idea of making a little money on the side. I use this as a “side hustle”. I can do most of the jobs right from my phone.
cons: There are many flaws in this particular software. Some jobs take 30 days to payout. And the payout is very small. You have to wait until you reach $10 for a payout and that can take days, or weeks. Also, you can only complete a few of the search and rank jobs. These should be unlimited, as you only earn $0.30 for each. There should be more jobs available and bigger payout sooner.

author: Gianluigi P.
pros: Permette di guadagnare denaro eseguendo semplici task, molto spesso rapide e di facili esecuzione.
cons: La poca varietà delle tasks e l'utilizzo di piattaforme esterne.

review_title: Clickworker software Will get the job done
description: With Clickworker i use it to accept task such as doing surveys, uploading media files. All jobs are very easy and have attractive money associated with them
author: Warren W.
pros: Clickworker gives a very unique and simple task which requires no technical knowledge for example uploading DL, Passport and also uploading voice messages. It also helps with other task such as posting photographs
cons: There is nothing about this software that i dislike, I highly recommend it

author: Jennifer R.
pros: I have been a Clickworker user for almost two years. I use the app to take jobs from my phone. It is easy, legit and a nice way to make some extra money.
cons: I don't like how the Clickworker app will not let you access UHRS from inside the app.

author: osvaldo V.
pros: The clickworker promotes extra income opportunities with home-office tasks, giving the opportunity for higher quality
cons: There could be a way to alert notifications by sms or email, about new related tasks at the moment

author: Fabian P.
pros: lo conozco principalmente por el area de encuesta
cons: son muy complicadas y larga y cuesta mucho que sea elegido
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Fair, I can't complain because it's an international market that anyone who has the relevant skills can connect with their clients and the clients too can have their tasks done on time about their budget
author: Hope G.
pros: The fact that I can post my relevant skills and interested clients can access me, even international clients is a big deal for me
cons: The fact that I can stay an year without doing anything because it's like a bid one who offers their services at a low price will always win the deal
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Clickworker is a great app for home office jobs
author: Gisela C.
pros: This platform is very good, as you will be checking home office job's from different countries from the comfort of your home.
cons: Sometimes when I access the app I have the information about a job available, but I need to access it via computer, but when I access it through the computer, there is no available job.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Alles reibungslos und Erwartungen weit übertroffen
description: Ich habe Teilnehmer für eine wissenschaftliche Studie gesucht, die aber aus einem sehr eng bemessenen Kreis kommen mussten. Andere Anbieter konnten mir da nicht weiterhelfen bzw. wollten gar nicht erst auf die Kontaktaufnahme reagieren. Bei Clickworker wurde meine Anfrage aber ernst genommen und ich wurde bei der Vorbereitung sehr gut betreut. Das Aufsetzen der Studie war dann ein Kinderspiel, und die gesuchten Teilnehmer wurden in Rekordzeit geliefert - dabei hatte ich mir gar keine allzu großen Hoffnungen gemacht. Offenbar besteht dort ein riesiger, diverser Kandidatenpool. Hätte nicht besser laufen können! Und wenn ich früher über Clickworker gestolpert wäre, hätte es mir viel Zeit und Geld gespart.
author: Chris R.
pros: Der Kundensupport im Rahmen der Vorbereitung meiner Umfrage durch Herrn Dittrich war phänomenal! Schnell, freundlich und klar mit offensichtlich hervorragender Fachkenntnis.
cons: Man könnte die Umfrageoptionen noch weiter ausbauen; im Hinblick z.B. auf Filterfragen für den Zugang zur externen Umfrage. Als Workaround konnte ich aber auf den Rat des Kundensupports ein externes Tool nutzen, was wunderbar funktioniert hat.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I enjoy the variety of tasks that they offer. I have completed a few small tasks that have not taken a lot of my time but have paid me fairly.
author: Glada M.
pros: I like that I can make a little extra income by completing tasks.
cons: There is not anything to dislike about it that I have found yet.

description: Uso ele faz um tempo, de vez em quando realizo algumas atividades nele para fazer um extra e complementar minha renda. É uma plataforma séria e que valoriza seus colaboradores. Tem diversos tipos de trabalho a realizar, eu como usuária fico a vontade pra escolher o que mais me identifico. Recomendo.
author: Elisa S.
pros: O que eu mais gosto nele é que sempre tem tarefas disponíveis e o passo a passo que disponibilizam para executá-la com sucesso.
cons: Não tenho o que reclamar, gosto dele no geral.

review_title: A great way to make some extra money
description: I have had a positive experience with Clickworker. The platform is easy to use and navigate. The tasks are generally simple and can be completed quickly. The pay is decent and I have been able to withdraw my earnings without any issues. Overall, I would recommend Clickworker to anyone looking for a way to earn some extra money online.
author: Khole Chingnyon P.
pros: There are a few things that I like about the Clickworker software. One is that it is very user-friendly and easy to use. There is no learning curve involved in using the software and anyone can pick it up and use it without any problems. Another thing that I like about the Clickworker software is that it is very versatile and can be used for a variety of tasks. I have used it for data entry, online research, and even for creating online surveys. It is a very powerful tool that can be used for a variety of purposes.
cons: The fact that there are so many low-paying tasks and that the pay is often very low even for high-quality work.

description: I love this website. It is my #1 income generate site at all time. At the time of this writing, it already have closed to 2 millions of Clickworkers registered and more than 10,000 Clickworkers is online and ready to accept any errant job you are to be given.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is the best cloud sourcing site I had ever had. It is good for data scientist who are looking for create and store large amount of data and to be created by human. As for the micro-task worker (aka Clickworker) also, this is the best place for you to earn some extra money out of it. Personally, I had earn about 400€ per month on average just from this site alone. For those who had a Chinese Language background, it is an added advantage for you. It came out as some 70,000 micro task for you at the rate of €0.025 for you just to read out a short sentence in Mandarin. At the time of this writing, it is still left of some 50,000 sentence to be read. Each sentence will take you less than 15 seconds to complete it. Imagine one sentence takes 15 seconds. one minutes can do 4 sentences, one hour can do 60x4 = 240 sentences. One day of work 8 hours, you can complete 1920 sentences. That is equivalent to €48. And per month you may make up to €1440!!! I special love another job of VALIDATE where they ask you just to validate the recording of the Chinese words recorded by other Clickworkers. Just click approve or reject and you will be paid by the same amount of recording jobs. Remember to point or where is the error if rejected. If you choose those with CCJK type, you may earn up to 20X of what normally a single sentences was read out. But the time required to complete it also 20X more. For those who doesn't understand Mandarin can also sign up. It is accepted world wide.
cons: The payment is not made immediately. Some job will take 30 days or even 60 days before you will get paid. Payment made via Paypal. In Euro dollars.
